'''âh-n-p''' ('''kahanap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chagrine|chagrine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chagrine|chagrine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-n-p
|-
! Lemma
| kahanap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihanap|thihanap]] || [[word:jihanap|jihanap]] || [[word:shihanap|shihanap]] || [[word:kihanap|kihanap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhanap|thuthuhanap]] || [[word:jujuhanap|jujuhanap]] || [[word:shushuhanap|shushuhanap]] || [[word:kukuhanap|kukuhanap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhanap|thuhanap]] || [[word:juhanap|juhanap]] || [[word:shuhanap|shuhanap]] || [[word:kuhanap|kuhanap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhanap|thuhanap]] || [[word:juhanap|juhanap]] || [[word:shuhanap|shuhanap]] || [[word:kuhanap|kuhanap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehanap|thehanap]] || [[word:jehanap|jehanap]] || [[word:shehanap|shehanap]] || [[word:kehanap|kehanap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohanap|thothohanap]] || [[word:jojohanap|jojohanap]] || [[word:shoshohanap|shoshohanap]] || [[word:kokohanap|kokohanap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohanap|thohanap]] || [[word:johanap|johanap]] || [[word:shohanap|shohanap]] || [[word:kohanap|kohanap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohanap|thohanap]] || [[word:johanap|johanap]] || [[word:shohanap|shohanap]] || [[word:kohanap|kohanap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhanap|thĂŠhanap]] || [[word:jĂŠhanap|jĂŠhanap]] || [[word:shĂŠhanap|shĂŠhanap]] || [[word:kĂŠhanap|kĂŠhanap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahanap|thathahanap]] || [[word:jajahanap|jajahanap]] || [[word:shashahanap|shashahanap]] || [[word:kakahanap|kakahanap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahanap|thahanap]] || [[word:jahanap|jahanap]] || [[word:shahanap|shahanap]] || [[word:kahanap|kahanap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahanap|thahanap]] || [[word:jahanap|jahanap]] || [[word:shahanap|shahanap]] || [[word:kahanap|kahanap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahanap|shahanap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahanap|goshahanap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahanap|gokishahanap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahanapnĂŒ|shahanapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahanapnknĂŒ|goshahanapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanapnĂŒ|gokishahanapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahanapshĂ«|shahanapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahanapnkshĂ«|goshahanapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahanapshĂ«|gokishahanapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanapro|shahanapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanapnkro|goshahanapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanapro|gokishahanapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanapmu|shahanapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanapnkmu|goshahanapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanapmu|gokishahanapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahanapsher|shahanapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahanapnksher|goshahanapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahanapsher|gokishahanapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahanapng|shahanapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahanapnkng|goshahanapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahanapng|gokishahanapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahanapya|shahanapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahanapnkya|goshahanapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahanapya|gokishahanapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahanapyam|shahanapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahanapnkyam|goshahanapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahanapyam|gokishahanapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahanapnĂŒshĂ«|shahanapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahanapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahanapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahanapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahanapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanapnĂŒro|shahanapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanapnknĂŒro|goshahanapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanapnĂŒro|gokishahanapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanapnĂŒmu|shahanapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanapnknĂŒmu|goshahanapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanapnĂŒmu|gokishahanapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahanapshĂ«nĂŒ|shahanapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahanapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahanapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahanapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanapshĂ«ro|shahanapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanapnkshĂ«ro|goshahanapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanapshĂ«ro|gokishahanapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanapshĂ«mu|shahanapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanapnkshĂ«mu|goshahanapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanapshĂ«mu|gokishahanapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahanapronĂŒ|shahanapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahanapnkronĂŒ|goshahanapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanapronĂŒ|gokishahanapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahanaproshĂ«|shahanaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahanapnkroshĂ«|goshahanapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahanaproshĂ«|gokishahanaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahanapromu|shahanapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahanapnkromu|goshahanapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahanapromu|gokishahanapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahanapmunĂŒ|shahanapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahanapnkmunĂŒ|goshahanapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahanapmunĂŒ|gokishahanapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahanapmushĂ«|shahanapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahanapnkmushĂ«|goshahanapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahanapmushĂ«|gokishahanapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahanapmuro|shahanapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahanapnkmuro|goshahanapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahanapmuro|gokishahanapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
